name: AI-ML Intern · All India Council for Technical Education
description: Deployed and maintained production-grade machine learning infrastructure on AWS, including three SageMaker endpoints with over 99% uptime and sub-200ms average response times. Built scalable AWS Glue ETL jobs and optimized S3 partitioning to reduce data preprocessing time by over 30%, while lowering ML training costs by more than 20% through spot instances and optimized instance selection. Automated a SageMaker Ground Truth labeling pipeline that processed 20,000 items in two weeks with 92% label quality.
